text:
> First, have you tried -current?  A boatload of quirks have gone
> into the tree.

No, I have not. It is not even released yet (much less debugged) and I can
not convert my only computer to it :(

> Next, have you tried to different quirks available for this device?

Mmm, no... How would I do that?

Thanks for the prompt response! Yours,

	-mi
